title: SoDA LLM Workshop Winner
description: Winner of the SoDA LLM workshop for creating note summarizer AI web application at ASU.

title: AI Model Development Credential
description: Earned intermediate-level credential for AI Model Development by Voxel 51 at ASU.

title: Microcontroller Programming Basics
description: Earned credential for Microcontroller Programming Basics by ASU Engineering SWAP Hub.

title: Assistive Technology Microcontroller Applications
description: Completed Assistive Technology Microcontroller Applications course by ASU Engineering SWAP Hub.

title: AI MakerSpace
description: Successfully completed the AI MakerSpace program at ASU.

title: SoDA Mentor Finalist
description: Recognized as a Top 2 finalist in SoDA Mentorship program spring 2025 out of 16 mentors and 30 mentees for outstanding leadership and project delivery.

title: JEE Advanced 2017
description: Achieved a rank of 3006 in the JEE Advanced 2017 examination.

title: Ohacks Summer 2025 Winner
description: Led a team to achieve 3rd place in the Summer Volunteer Internship Hackathon 2025 out of a total of 18 participating teams and 123 participants, developing an innovative drive management solution with a collaborative chat interface and agentic AI integration.

title: Outstanding High School Performance
description: Received recognition from Mrs Smriti Irani (Indian Education Minister) for outstanding performance in high school.
